name: Particle Text
description: Text composed of thousands of particles that scatter on mouse hover and spring back with damped oscillation. Supports gradient colors and ghost trails.
accessibility_notes: text is rendered as canvas pixels — provide an accessible text alternative

text.description: The text string to render as particles

collapsed.description: When true, particles cluster tighter with stiffer springs and no mouse interaction

use_cases: hero title with interactive particle effect
conflicts: canvas text rendering depends on font loading — may flash on first paint
high particle count on long text strings
usage_tip: Best for single hero title with interactive scatter; provide alt text for a11y.
